growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.analyst_take: Quality software reset with real AI monetization, 50% drawdown, reasonable forward multiple, and Q2 earnings as a near-term catalyst.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.analyst_take: Micron has the best mix of AI-memory growth, low forward valuation, pricing momentum, and analyst upside in this batch.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.analyst_take: Microsoft is a high-quality AI/cloud compounder now down nearly 29% from highs with strong margins and Q4 earnings as a catalyst.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Market Chameleon's July 16 options report showed NVDA 17-Jul-26 215C trading 124,440 contracts, one of the session's heaviest near-dated call concentrations and a sign of aggressive upside positioning.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Nvidia remains the best risk-adjusted AI infrastructure compounder in the batch, with growth, margins, and valuation all aligned.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: A fresh EU crisis team focused on a China rare-earth standoff, July 9 G7 talks on rare-earth price floors, and China's export controls on MP itself all reinforce MP Materials as the cleanest U.S. beneficiary of the move to de-risk critical minerals away from China.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Strategic rare-earth exposure with DoD support, China export-control pressure, high short interest, and large target upside outweigh near-term losses.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Broadcom is monetizing custom AI silicon and AI networking at scale, and recent Meta chip plans add another demand leg to a business already reporting that AI now drives a major share of sales.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: A July 7-10 cluster showed CEO Che-Chia Wei buying 146 shares for about $11.2K, VP Bor-Zen Tien buying 2,000 shares for about $152.3K, and VP Lipen Yuan adding 1,000 shares for about $75.3K to $79.2K, signaling broad insider accumulation in a mega-cap AI foundry leader.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Reuters-reported tanker rates in the Persian Gulf and marine-insurance premiums have jumped sharply since the Hormuz crisis, so Frontline's crude-tanker fleet should capture higher day rates if vessel traffic stays rerouted and risk premiums remain elevated.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Shopify is about 32% below its 52-week high while still generating healthy margins and positive earnings, and it reports on Aug 5, 2026 before the open; the setup fits a beaten-down growth name with a catalyst, although the bear case is that the stock still trades at a demanding forward multiple.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Shopify offers durable 30%+ growth, positive FCF, and a 32% drawdown, but the entry needs discipline because valuation is still demanding.

growth_picks.source_detail: Independently discovered via web research
catalysts_general: Discovery: UHS is nearly 40% below its 52-week high while still producing solid margins, and its next earnings date is Jul 27, 2026; that gives you a profitable healthcare name with a clear catalyst, but the bear case is that cost pressure and the Talkspace integration could keep the reset from sticking.

growth_picks.source_detail: Independently discovered via web research

growth_picks.source_detail: Independently discovered via web research

growth_picks.source_detail: Independently discovered via web research

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: The Strait of Hormuz disruption has cut into Qatar LNG flows and left Europe only about half full on gas storage heading into winter, which strengthens Cheniere's position as the lowest-risk large U.S. LNG exporter and the default counterparty for buyers scrambling to replace Gulf supply.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Cheniere has a live geopolitical demand catalyst, raised guidance, and a reasonable forward multiple, partly offset by leverage.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Independently discovered via web research
catalysts_general: Discovery: Comcast is one of Morningstar's undervalued large caps, and the stock has been trading more than 30% below its 52-week high while still throwing off cash and beating the market on several recent sessions.

growth_picks.source_detail: Independently discovered via web research

growth_picks.source_detail: Independently discovered via web research

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Independently discovered via web research

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Independently discovered via web research

growth_picks.source_detail: Independently discovered via web research

growth_picks.source_detail: Independently discovered via web research

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: NATO allies said they have lifted core defense spending to around 4% of GDP, and July 13-15 coverage shows Europe and Ukraine building new ballistic-missile and air-defense coalitions while Patriot interceptors are being produced in Germany, which keeps RTX's Patriot, GEM-T, and missile-defense backlog under pressure from the current rearmament cycle.

growth_picks.source_detail: Independently discovered via web research

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Independently discovered via web research

growth_picks.source_detail: Independently discovered via web research

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Independently discovered via web research

growth_picks.source_detail: Independently discovered via web research
catalysts_general: Discovery: Clorox combines Morningstar undervaluation with a recent pullback of roughly 27% from its 52-week high, giving a defensive consumer name a cheaper entry point after a long period of cost and margin pressure.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: The Iran war has expanded into cyber and information warfare, with Iranian-linked tracking of U.S. military phones and new EU/UK sanctions on Russian cyber networks, which should keep enterprise and government demand elevated for CrowdStrike's endpoint, identity, and threat-intelligence stack.
